description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:3.2 Docker image and caches the Bundler directory (vendor/bundle). Define two stages: build and deploy, and set the variable JEKYLL_ENV=production. In the build stage add a job called build_site that runs: gem install bundler, bundle install --path vendor/bundle, and bundle exec jekyll build -d public; then store the generated public/ folder as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that publishes the public artifact to GitLab Pages, runs only on the main branch, and uses the artifact from the build stage.
